dsl_rule.translation_notes: Bullish Breakaway pattern translated as: (1) Body size must be large relative to ATR_14 to detect 'tall' candles, (2) Close below previous close indicates bearish pressure/downtrend continuation, (3) Close above previous open indicates white candle reversal. Exit conditions set conservatively when price breaks below recent lows, signaling pattern failure. Pattern is extremely rare (sample_size=41) per source data. Multiple days of lower closes and multi-day retrace detection require bar-by-bar analysis during backtest execution.

backtest_rule.reason: Bullish Breakaway pattern translated as: (1) Body size must be large relative to ATR_14 to detect 'tall' candles, (2) Close below previous close indicates bearish pressure/downtrend continuation, (3) Close above previous open indicates white candle reversal. Exit conditions set conservatively when price breaks below recent lows, signaling pattern failure. Pattern is extremely rare (sample_size=41) per source data. Multiple days of lower closes and multi-day retrace detection require bar-by-bar analysis during backtest execution.

source_rule_text: Bullish Breakaway: Price forms a tall black candle in a downtrend, then candle lines continue lower with prices closing down each day until a tall white candle ends bearish pressure. In one day, price retakes the ground lost during the prior three days. Usually followed by upward breakout.
